title: spiraea × racemosa
intro: Spiraea × racemosa, also known as Vanillie or Bridal Wreath, is a hybrid shrub that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spiraea × racemosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Spiraea × racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
